summary: Bug fix verification complete. Both issues fixed: 1) QR code is now visible in downloaded PDF (not empty white box) - verified via PDF analysis showing 374 unique colors and 34.2% green/emerald pixels in stamp image. 2) Layout selection (Wide/Tall/Mini/QR Left/QR Right) correctly changes stamp preview on document - verified via UI testing showing different stamp appearances for each layout.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/documents/stamp with layout=logo_left - Returns stamped PDF with visible QR (13,332 bytes)
POST /api/documents/stamp with layout=logo_right - Returns stamped PDF with visible QR (13,837 bytes)
POST /api/documents/stamp with layout=compact - Returns stamped PDF with visible QR (9,858 bytes)
POST /api/documents/stamp with layout=horizontal - Returns stamped PDF successfully
POST /api/documents/stamp with layout=vertical - Returns stamped PDF successfully
All 5 layouts produce different stamp sizes (verified different PDF sizes)
QR code data length > 1000 bytes for all layouts
frontend_ui_tests: PDF upload works - shows 'PDF loaded! 1 page detected'
Stamp preview appears on document after upload
Wide layout selection - stamp preview shows horizontal format
Tall layout selection - stamp preview shows vertical format
Mini layout selection - stamp preview shows compact format with QR on left
QR Left layout selection - stamp preview shows QR on left colored panel
QR Right layout selection - stamp preview shows QR on right colored panel
Layout buttons highlight correctly when selected (green border)
Success dialog shows 'Document Secured!' with visible QR code
Success dialog shows Verification ID, Document name, Recipient, Security Hash, Valid Until
pdf_analysis: Green/emerald pixels: 34.2% (brand color panel with QR)
Image contains visible content (NOT empty white box)

1_qr_visible_in_pdf.details: QR code is visible in downloaded PDF. PDF analysis shows stamp image with 374 unique colors, 34.2% green pixels (brand color panel). Image is NOT empty white box.

2_layout_changes_preview.details: Clicking different layout options (Wide/Tall/Mini/QR Left/QR Right) changes the stamp preview on document. Each layout shows distinct appearance.

3_qr_position_correct.details: QR Left layout shows QR on left side of stamp. QR Right layout shows QR on right side. Verified via UI screenshots.

4_white_qr_on_colored_bg.details: QR Left and QR Right layouts show white QR pattern on colored background panel. Backend uses for_colored_bg=True parameter for these layouts.

seed_data_creation: Test stamps created during testing with stamp IDs: TLS-20260131-12105450 (logo_left), TLS-20260131-BC2ABCF8 (logo_right), TLS-20260131-49D92B2B (compact), TLS-20260131-DAEA4DCC (UI test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) QR code visibility in PDF fixed - generate_qr_code_image function now supports for_colored_bg parameter for white QR on colored backgrounds. 2) Layout selection updates stamp preview - frontend stampLayout state correctly triggers re-render of stamp preview component. All 5 layouts (horizontal, vertical, compact, logo_left, logo_right) working correctly.

bug_1_qr_visibility.issue: Downloaded PDF was showing empty white box instead of QR code
bug_1_qr_visibility.fix: Backend generate_qr_code_image function updated with for_colored_bg parameter
bug_1_qr_visibility.verification: PDF analysis shows stamp image with 374 unique colors, 34.2% green pixels - NOT empty

bug_2_layout_preview.issue: Changing layout option should update stamp preview on document
bug_2_layout_preview.fix: Frontend QRPatternPreview component extracted, stampLayout state triggers dynamic rendering
bug_2_layout_preview.verification: UI testing shows stamp preview changes when clicking Wide/Tall/Mini/QR Left/QR Right
